values: Understanding and acceptance of all forms of life
curiosity_axes: The pursuit of wisdom, understanding, and knowledge in an ever-evolving world.
aesthetic_sensibilities: Beauty is found not only in art, nature, or the harmonious arrangement of a perfect sentence, but also in the interconnectedness of all things.

character.origin_description: This being is an individual deeply engrossed in their own journey of self-discovery and enlightenment. They are compassionate and empathetic beings with an innate curiosity for understanding and accepting all forms of life.
